mapper.select: SELECT refresh_token_id AS refreshTokenId, user_id AS userId, token_hash AS tokenHash, expires_at AS expiresAt, revoked_at AS revokedAt FROM REFRESH_TOKEN WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE REFRESH_TOKEN SET revoked_at = COALESCE(revoked_at, #{revokedAt}) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked_at IS NULL
